intent: Sole sweep fixture for 1s_1br_nw_front_rear_bath_gr -- 8x10 m lot, 24.0 m2 buildable floor, matching this topology's canonical scale. Deliberately restricted to this one compact point (2026-07-20): the bedroom is anchored to BOTH side walls (full-width by construction), which pins feasibility to a narrow ~7.5-8.0 m width corridor regardless of depth -- 9x11 and 10x12 (the round-number progression used for its sibling nw_front_back_split_bath_gr) are both infeasible here. No _med/_max siblings by design; larger sizes are expected to stay infeasible, not a gap to fill.
